_meta.title: Area-of-interest taxonomy — the retrieval drilldown
_meta.role: Reuses the cyoa.js engine. A participant drills Scale → Field → Source to locate WHERE a transition lives for them; the leaf composes an area-φ ⌖(<field> | <source>) :<scale> handed to the GPT (Mode C) alongside the transition hinge. Personal/Local/Global = micro/meso/macro social stratification (emergence flows outward, constraint flows inward; ideas need a Local 'carrier wave' to travel from Personal to Global).

scales.label: Personal
scales.gloss: the scale of the individual — where “I” appears most vividly, already shot through with the layers above
scales.characterization: Embodied cognition, identity formation, affective patterns, moment-to-moment sensemaking, small interactions. The holding environment where a meme is first tested, mutated, or rejected — where a single insight, grief, or reorientation can originate.

fields.gloss: the voice that runs when no one is listening
the work you make when no one asked — writing, painting, code
the small repeated things that hold you
fields.phrase: a private ritual or daily practice

fields.gloss: mind or body reporting something — illness, trauma, a perceptual filter
fields.phrase: living with a symptom in the body or mind

fields.gloss: the quiet recalibration of what matters

scales.label: Local
scales.gloss: the scale of groups, places, and institutions — where “we” becomes operational, and most change either sticks or evaporates
scales.characterization: Norm emergence, collective sensemaking, trust and reputation, subculture formation, the translation of personal intent into shared protocols. The primary amplification chamber — the carrier wave a meme needs to travel from Personal toward Global.

fields.text: A community of practice or belief
fields.gloss: a craft, a faith, a scene held in common
fields.phrase: a community of practice or belief

fields.gloss: the rhythms, conflicts, and affordances of a somewhere
fields.phrase: a specific place and its community

fields.gloss: a school, clinic, co-op, congregation, city hall
fields.phrase: a local institution (a school, clinic, co-op)

scales.label: Global
scales.gloss: the scale of societies, world-systems, and dominant logics — where “it” (the system) appears impersonal, yet is enacted by smaller scales
scales.characterization: Cultural hegemony, legal and economic architectures, global information regimes, geopolitical and ecological constraints, long-wave meme propagation. The selection environment that rewards or punishes whole classes of local and personal patterns.

fields.gloss: who may move, and who may not
the money and tax rules everyone lives inside
fields.phrase: the economic and tax architecture of a society

fields.gloss: the wave of a technology arriving (e.g. AI)
the ecological ceiling and its discourse
fields.phrase: planetary ecological limits and their discourse

fields.gloss: the dominant story of how things are — of mind, progress, risk
law, policy, and institutional logic at planetary scale
